CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value DECIMAL(10, 2));
CREATE TABLE additional_data (group_id INT, value DECIMAL(10, 2));
SELECT group_id, sys.median(value) FROM additional_data GROUP BY group_id;
CREATE TABLE complex_data (group_id INT, category VARCHAR(50), value REAL);
SELECT category, sys.median(value) FROM complex_data GROUP BY category;
SELECT sys.median(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE join_data (a INT, b INT);
SELECT j.a, sys.median(t.value) FROM join_data j JOIN test_data t ON j.a = t.id GROUP BY j.a;
SELECT sys.median(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM additional_data WHERE group_id = 1) AS filtered_subquery;
CREATE TABLE temporal_data (event_date DATE, event_value DECIMAL(10, 2));
SELECT sys.median(event_value) FROM temporal_data WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
